name: mylang
description: Node.js CLI project for a TypeScript-like language with compiler and language server

scripts.build: esbuild compiler/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/mylang.js --sourcemap --external:commander --external:vscode-languageserver --external:vscode-languageserver-textdocument --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --log-level=error && cp compiler/runtime/ecmascript.d.my dist/ecmascript.d.my && cp compiler/runtime/es2025.d.ts dist/es2025.d.ts && cp compiler/runtime/dom.d.ts dist/dom.d.ts && chmod +x dist/mylang.js
